codeReview.summary: The output artifact is a comprehensive SKILL.md template guide that fully satisfies VAL-APP-001. The template includes complete YAML frontmatter with all required fields (name, description) and optional fields (keywords, version, author), placeholder sections with HTML comments providing guidance, example content for each section, a quality checklist, and a complete working example (protheus-query skill with 3 examples). The template is clearly marked as 'Copy-Paste Ready' and is enclosed in a fenced code block for easy copying.

summary: Feature passes review. The practical guide template fulfills all requirements of VAL-APP-001: (1) Template has complete YAML frontmatter with name and description fields, (2) Template includes all required sections (Role, Procedure, Examples, Success Criteria, Limitations) with commented placeholders, (3) Template provides example content for each section, (4) Template is copy-paste ready in a fenced code block. Worker followed the analysis-worker skill procedure correctly, ran baseline tests before committing, and produced a well-structured comprehensive document with traceability to synthesis sources.
